CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓

- analyze-tool-use.py::render_report (194→19 lines) — extracted _render_report_header, _render_antipattern_findings, _render_error_and_distribution
- figma-merge.py::main (189→32 lines) — extracted _parse_args, _load_inputs, _run_merge_pipeline, _write_outputs
- check-script-writes.py::find_violations_in_ast (183→11 lines) — extracted _is_cd_to_variable, _walk_stmts, _walk_stmt, _walk_nested
- ticket-graph.py::add_dependency (124→27 lines) — extracted _resolve_and_redirect, _check_cycles_for_link, _guard_closed_tickets
- ticket-graph.py::main (137→17 lines) — extracted _find_tracker_dir, _handle_resolve_hierarchy, _handle_link_mode, _handle_deps_query
- figma_resync.py::run (156→55 lines) — extracted _validate_ticket_preconditions, _display_and_confirm

All refactored files: syntax OK, ruff clean, functions <= 180 lines
